# INS Trade Media Service

> Specialist trade media outreach for industrial manufacturers and suppliers. Headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.

INS Trade Media Service (Industrial News Service – INS Oy/Ab) works with industrial companies to secure targeted editorial coverage in specialist trade publications. We select relevant titles per campaign, prepare technical content and translations, manage personalised outreach to editors, and report on results. Database covers 100,000+ trade media outlets in 160 countries. Over 40 years focused on industrial B2B.

## Services

- Campaign-specific selection of relevant trade titles and editors
- Maintained newsroom for journalist access
- Preparation and adaptation of technical announcements
- Professional translation for target markets
- Personalised outreach and follow-up with editors
- Monitoring, placement tracking and KPI reporting

- Homepage: https://ins.fi/
- Why Trade Media: https://ins.fi/why-trade-media

- Email: services@ins.fi

## Notable results (examples from client campaigns)

- 257+ proven publications across 6 campaigns for one marine client
- KONE achieved more than double the coverage of two major competitors in the same DACH campaign window
- 500+ articles from the Swedish Steel Prize programme across 11 languages
- Single campaigns regularly achieving coverage in 50–60+ relevant trade titles

## Related sites
